name: Aslan (Hierate)
description: Descended from four-limbed carnivorous pouncer stock native to Kusyu, the Aslan are an expansionist warrior race organized into patriarchal clans. An Aslan of the Hierate — the vast coreward-spinward civilization that is the species' political and cultural heart — is raised under strict codes of honour, land-ownership (for males) and administrative authority (for females), with dueling and territory-claim as central facts of adult life.

traits.name: Dewclaw
traits.description: All Aslan have a dewclaw which can be extended to make for a vicious close combat weapon. The dewclaw uses the Melee (natural) skill and does 1D+2 damage.

traits.name: Heightened Senses
traits.description: Aslan have better night vision, hearing and sense of smell than humans. All Aslan receive DM+1 to any Recon and Survival checks they have to make.

traits.name: Code of Honour
traits.description: Hierate-raised Aslan live by strict conduct codes. DM+1 to Persuade checks with other Hierate Aslan; a Hierate Aslan who breaks their word in front of witnesses suffers DM-2 to all social checks with Hierate society until it is redressed (typically by duel).
